mapper.select:
select count(*) from wf_process_instance where applicant_id = #{applicantId}
and status = #{status}
select pi.* from wf_process_instance pi INNER JOIN wf_task t ON pi.id = t.instance_id where t.assignee_id = #{approverId} and t.status = 'PENDING' order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from wf_process_instance pi INNER JOIN wf_task t ON pi.id = t.instance_id where t.assignee_id = #{approverId} and t.status = 'PENDING'
mapper.insert: insert into wf_process_instance (def_id, def_name, template_id, applicant_id, form_data, status, create_time) values (#{defId}, #{defName}, #{templateId}, #{applicantId}, #{formData}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: update wf_process_instance set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
